name: MAG-7 | 鎏铜
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been custom painted to look like it was held under a stream of liquid copper. This was an accident, not a mistake...
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器的自定义涂装采用了看似铜水浇灌形成的图案。 这是一场意外，不是人为的……
